system.description: When you and your allies need to get out of here, name your escape route and roll +INT: on a 10+, you're gone; on a 7-9, you can stay or go, but if you go, it costs you—the GM will tell you what (or who) you leave behind or take with you.

partial.value: You can stay or go, but if you go, it costs you—the GM will tell you what (or who) you leave behind or take with you.
